_doc_icon: Optional per-workspace identity overlay (name / icon). aerospace.toml owns workspace EXISTENCE — this file just adds optional metadata on top. Slots are keyed `<displayUUID>:<workspaceName>`; the shell writes under the `_unassigned` wildcard UUID and the Swift side rebinds the real display UUID when it resolves the workspace to a monitor. Customize with `ws name <WS> <name>` or `ws icon <WS> <icon>` — an SF Symbol name stores kind=sfSymbol; a literal glyph stores a kind=nerdFont codepoint (as does `ws theme NAME --with-icons`). Color is theme-driven — `ws theme NAME` repaints the palette. Nerd Font glyphs render via: brew install --cask font-jetbrains-mono-nerd-font
